## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Tests

- [ ] Backend tests: `pytest -q`
- [ ] Frontend lint: `npm run lint`
- [ ] Frontend tests: `npm run test:run`
- [ ] Frontend build: `npm run build`
- [ ] Windows tests: `powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/tests/run.ps1`
- [ ] Other relevant checks are described below, or are not applicable.

Test details and results:

## Dependencies and lockfiles

- [ ] Dependency changes are documented, including why each dependency is needed.
- [ ] Relevant lockfiles were updated, or no dependency versions changed.

## Model provenance and license

- [ ] New or changed models include their source, version, provenance, and license, or this change does not affect models.

## Data, weights, and secrets

- [ ] This pull request does not commit business datasets, model weights, credentials, tokens, private URLs, personal data, or other secrets.

## Documentation

- [ ] User and developer documentation was updated where behavior or workflows changed, or no documentation update is needed.
